error_signature: drag & drop element stops working when multiple is OFF
title: Drag & Drop File Element Fails with Multiple OFF
symptom: When the 'multiple' option is turned off in the drag & drop file element, the element stops functioning properly. Users cannot upload files as expected.
root_cause: The drag & drop file element is designed to handle multiple files, and when the 'multiple' option is disabled, it returns a single object instead of an array. This causes issues with how the uploaded file is processed and displayed in the application.
fix_steps: Ensure the 'multiple' option is turned ON during testing.
Add a true/false split in the workflow to check if more than one file was uploaded.
If true, update the variable with the array of uploaded files.
If false, wrap the single uploaded file object inside an array using 'createArray'.
Set up similar logic on the container to check the length of the input file variable.
agent_instruction: Wrap the single uploaded file object in an array to ensure proper handling when 'multiple' is OFF.
